zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Braose於大約1302年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親Sir Peter de Braose31歲，母親Agnes de Clifford27歲。他於大約1328年與Margaret Trehampton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年8月之後在英國英格蘭多瑟特武德藍茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Braose于大约1302年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲Sir Peter de Braose31岁，母亲Agnes de Clifford27岁。他于大约1328年与Margaret Trehampton在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年8月之后在英国英格兰多瑟特武德藍茲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Braose was born about 1302, in Dorset, England, his father, Sir Peter de Braose, was 31 and his mother, Agnes de Clifford, was 27. He married Margaret Trehampton about 1328, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after August 1349, in Woodlands, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Braose est né environ 1302, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter de Braose, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Clifford, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Trehampton environ 1328, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après août 1349, à Woodlands, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Braose um 1302 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Peter de Braose 31 und seine Mutter Agnes de Clifford 27. Er hat um 1328 in England Margaret Trehampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach August 1349 in Woodlands, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Braose è nato il circa 1302 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, Sir Peter de Braose, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Clifford, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Trehampton circa 1328, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il agosto 1349, nel Woodlands, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Braoseが約1302年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Braoseは31歳，母Agnes de Cliffordは27歳であった。約1328年にイギリスでMargaret Trehamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年8月以後にイギリスイギリスドールセトウッドランズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Braose(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Peter de Braose(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Clifford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1328년 영국에서 Margaret Trehampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 8월 이후 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 우들랜드즈에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Braose nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter de Braose, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Clifford, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Trehampton aproximadamente 1328, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após agosto de 1349, em Woodlands, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Braose родился около 1302 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Peter de Braose было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Clifford, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Trehampton около 1328 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после августа 1349 г. в местности вудландс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.ABT 1302–after August, 1349: e tusa o le 1302–ina ua ma'ea le Aukuso 1349

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Braose nació aproximadamente 1302, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter de Braose, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes de Clifford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Trehampton aproximadamente 1328, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de agosto de 1349, en Woodlands, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
